[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Vig''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] officer who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. 

==Biography==
Vig was an efficient [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial Officer]] who by [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] reached the rank of [[Major/Legends|Major]], and won respect within his ranks for his courage and competence. Inspiring respect, and quick in using a [[blaster/Legends|blaster]], his men obeyed his orders. Vig afforded himself of grooming a nonreg moustache, which, thanks to his good reputation, was tolerated by his frustrated superiors.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] he was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance Battle Group|battle group]] which invaded the [[planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] for his [[Search for the Valley of the Jedi|quest for the Valley of the Jedi]]. [[New Sith Wars|Ancient]] artifacts were found in caves around the [[Valley of the Jedi]], which Jerec thought would compensate the corporate sponsors for the expenses made by his fleets, and satisfy his critics within the [[Imperial Remnant]]. The Major oversaw the looting of the chambers and became very familiar with the necropolis complex and toured several officers who came to the area. Soon the "archaeological" operations stirred the trapped [[Force ghost/Legends|spirits]] of the necropolis, scaring his men and causing a chaos that stopped progress.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JKaudio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

One morning Vig sent a Stormtrooper to accompany [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yun]] at the cavern; the young Jedi was sent to assume command of the team. In the midst of another havoc by the "Screamers", as the troopers called the ghosts, Vig tried to return his men to order with threats, when Yun entered the chamber. They saw three spectres penetrating a trooper's body and another chaos would erupt if Yun didn't announce his presence and offer his help. Vig's troopers felt relieved within their shock, seeing one of those [[Seven Dark Jedi|exalted figures]] surrounding the almost-mythical Jerec.<ref name="JK" /> Yun suggested to Vig to proceed in some executions in order to restore order, to which Vig objected, crediting it to horror which he also feels. Yun commented that his compassion was an interesting tactic<ref name="JKaudio" /> and then Vig saw him concentrating and pacifying the screamers. Assured that from then on the screamers would be dealt with, Vig ordered his men to resume their work, deciding to turn a blind eye to their insubordination.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" />

The Major offered a tour around the base, and demonstrated to the newcomer the use of an ancient [[stasis field/Legends|stasis]]-operated [[food rations|ration pack]] which revived living creatures ready for lunch. In other rooms he showed other treasures such as healing machines, as well as a [[Tractor_beam_projector/Legends|tractor beam projector]] and a [[Fusion_generator/Legends|fusion reactor]], both of minimal size.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" /> This was followed by a formal lunch in a repurposed storeroom with a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] and two [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenants]]. At the end of the meal he saw Lt. [[Hab]] and then Yun being possessed by a screamer.<ref name="JK" />

A couple of days later a groundquake happened and Vig saw [[Jaru]] trapped under a slab of rock. The Major tried to handle the rescue efforts, however the workers were unable to move the rock and the [[construction droid/Legends|construction droids]] were three [[standard minute/Legends|minutes]] away but the boulder kept etching down and there wa no long time for the man. He was joined by Yun to whom he explained what happened, and could not believe in his eyes seeing him using [[telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] to hover the boulder four [[Meter/Legends|meters]] off the ground, and ordered the workers to pull Jaru out. He expressed his amazement to Yun. He then ordered around his men to take Jaru to medical care.<ref name="JKaudio" />

==Personality and traits==
Vig was a large [[Human/Legends|Human]] male with a large, non-regulation mustache and short red hair. He was known for both his vast courage and his even greater competence.<ref name="JK" /> 

Vig did not ascribe to the [[Dark_side_of_the_Force/Legends|Dark Side]] philosophy of respect stemming from fear. Confronted with insubordination, Vig would unholster his gun to his men to force them return to order and continue with their jobs. However once the havoc was over, he would not go that far as to proceed to exemplary executions, knowing that it was result of uncontrollable horror. Yun found his "compassion" an interesting yet weak tactic.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'', he was voiced by [[Gary Groomes]].

==Appearances==
